This Chinese-Afro-Cuban painter, who shared both Boghossian's avowed inspiration from Santeria and his engagement with the Negritude movement, is known for cubist masterworks like The Jungle.
answers: Wifredo Lam [or Wifredo Óscar de la Concepción Lam y Castilla]
